name: tabnexus
description: Search, manage, and edit TabNexus workspaces and Chrome tabs from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Use browser workspaces and tabs in Codex
interface.longDescription: Read versioned TabNexus workspace context, inspect supported Chrome tabs, edit classifications and card metadata, arrange mind-map layouts, and write reports from Codex.
defaultPrompt: Read my active TabNexus workspace and current Chrome tabs.
Summarize my saved sources and write a report back to TabNexus.
Reorganize my sources into clear groups and update their status.
Arrange my relationship map and connect supporting sources.
